name: Lacticaseibacillus paracasei JS-3
summary: Lacticaseibacillus paracasei JS-3 is normalized for C. elegans lifespan and elderly-donor microbiota fermentation evidence.
mechanism_summary: Uses a probiotic bacterial strain to probe microbial effects on antioxidant markers, lifespan, and gut-microbiota composition in preclinical systems.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: L. paracasei JS-3 C. elegans and elderly-gut-microbiota fermentation study; L. paracasei JS-3 extended C. elegans lifespan and shifted elderly-donor microbiota in vitro.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
